title: chamad #2530
definition:
v
 1) to desire, covet, take pleasure in, delight in
    1a) (Qal) to desire
    1b) (Niphal) to be desirable
    1c) (Piel) to delight greatly, desire greatly

 n f
 2) desirableness, preciousness
